data.body:
Plan-review advisory triage (PASS + signed). The advisories correctly flag that the ticket's `LLMConfig.from_env()` call-site index is STALE + INCOMPLETE — implementation must NOT trust the listed line numbers:

- STALE LINES: workflow_ops.py:329 is now a COMMENT (my #77 / drag-gripe-brake merge shifted lines); :113 likewise moved. Implementation will `grep -n "LLMConfig.from_env(" src/rebar/llm/plan_review/ src/rebar/llm/workflow/` and fix EVERY site, not the listed numbers (A1/E4/G1G2).
- MISSED SITE (critical T8/G6/A1): `plan_review_verify_inputs` (workflow_ops.py ~238) calls `_verifier_cfg(LLMConfig.from_env(...)).model` to size the verify request — must receive the resolved cfg/model identity too.
- gate_ops.completion_reconcile (~104) calls from_env ONLY for `cfg.repo_path` (not model/runner) — thread repo_path (or the resolved cfg identity) through inputs; document that this site needs repo_path, not just model/runner (G1G2).
- AC1 TEST (E5/E6/F1): add a DETERMINISTIC test that a caller passing an explicit `config=` (non-default model/runner) sees it in BOTH the LLM calls AND the verdict's model/runner fields — currently AC4 only says "existing tests pass". Will add to tests/unit/workflow/test_plan_review_workflow.py.
- CONTRACT (T5e): the new "ops read model/runner identity from ctx.inputs (threaded once at the run boundary) instead of re-deriving from env" is a workflow contract — document it at the produce_* boundary + the ops, mirroring the ticket_id threading pattern. Keep StepContext config-agnostic (per ticket scope).

Net: scope is broader than the ticket's line index implied (more from_env sites + the verify_inputs sizing path). No blocking issues. Will claim + implement after c38b (tarry-creep-range / PR #79) closes.
